name: Spaetzle Basic Dough Recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a saucepan of salted water to a boil, then reduce the heat and maintain a simmer.
2. In a bowl, stir all the ingredients together.
3. Place a colander over the pan and pour about 1/4 of the batter into the colander.
4. Press through the holes with a plastic spatula into the hot water using gentle pressure.
5. When the spaetzle starts to float to the surface, cover the pan and keep covered until the spaetzle appears to swell and is fluffy.
6. Remove the dumplings and repeat the procedure with the remaining batter.
